name: Psychiatric Session
description: Clinical template for therapy, counseling, or psychiatric sessions with privacy considerations.

sections.title: Session Summary
sections.instruction: Brief clinical summary of the session themes and patient presentation. Do NOT include personally identifiable information beyond what is clinically necessary.

sections.title: Presenting Concerns
sections.instruction: Primary concerns, symptoms, or issues discussed by the patient.

sections.title: Clinical Observations
sections.instruction: Mental status, affect, behavior, and other clinical observations.

sections.title: Interventions
sections.instruction: Therapeutic interventions, techniques, or approaches used during the session.

sections.title: Patient Response
sections.instruction: How the patient responded to interventions and session dynamics.

sections.title: Safety Assessment
sections.instruction: Risk assessment findings: self-harm, harm to others, substance use, etc. Mark NONE if not applicable.

sections.title: Plan & Recommendations
sections.instruction: Follow-up plan, homework, medication changes, referrals, and next session date.
